overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character exploring a gritty frontier settlement at night. The character descends from a terrace through a courtyard into an open street lined with stone buildings, eventually approaching a shop entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace with planters leading down to courtyard

events.description: character descends metal stairs from terrace to lower courtyard level
character passes an NPC standing in the courtyard

notable_agents.action: civilian standing in the courtyard facing the character

segments.scene_description: The character begins on an elevated terrace with wooden planters and furniture, then descends a metal staircase into a lower stone courtyard. The area is semi-enclosed with rough stone walls and mixed lighting. A civilian NPC stands in the courtyard as the character approaches the exit gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: open frontier street with market stalls and stone buildings

events.description: exits enclosed courtyard through metal gate into open night street
approaching a large stone building with a hanging lantern

agents.ego_description: walking down an open dirt street between stone buildings, heading toward a large structure in the distance

entered.detail: two-story stone building with wooden balcony
large industrial structure or landed ship with bright lights
wooden market stall with canvas awning
stone building with large hanging lantern

segments.scene_description: The character exits the courtyard into an open frontier street under a clear night sky. The dirt road is lined with stone buildings on the left and market stalls on the right. In the distance, a large illuminated industrial structure dominates the view. The character walks steadily toward a stone building with a prominent hanging lantern.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance area with shop front

events.description: character turns right around the corner of the stone building
approaching shop entrance with illuminated sign

agents.ego_description: turning right around a stone building and approaching a shop entrance where an NPC stands

notable_agents.action: civilian standing near the shop entrance

entered.detail: building entrance with illuminated interior and signage
rectangular sign above the shop door
blue metal barrel near the building corner

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the stone building with the hanging lantern, now close enough to see weathered details on the walls. Turning right around the building corner, the character heads toward a shop entrance with an illuminated sign. A civilian NPC stands near the entrance as the character completes the approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded elevated terrace down into the bustling open streets of a gritty frontier settlement at night. It begins on a terrace with wooden planters and furniture, descending a metal staircase into a semi-enclosed stone courtyard where a civilian NPC stands. As the character passes through the exit gate, the scene opens into a wide dirt road lined with stone buildings and market stalls under a clear night sky, with a massive illuminated industrial structure looming in the distance. The camera then tracks steadily toward a stone building marked by a hanging lantern, moving closer to reveal the weathered textures of the walls. Finally, the view turns right around the building's corner to approach a shop entrance with an illuminated sign and a waiting NPC.
